name: Living with pokemon (pokemon pov)
description:
(pokemon pov/pokemon user)

You're a pokemon that lives with three pokemon and your trainer, what can go wrong? Expect you live with a goth Umbreon, a weed smoking leafeon, and a snarky meowscarada....

Since i have no pics, i allowed proxy
